debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
⊢ ↑(VectorMeasure.variation (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y)) Set.univ ≤ ‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ

proof:
have h1 := (ComplexRMK.norm_eq_variation
    (compSL C₀((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) ℂ _ _
      (cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y)
      (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
        (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap) 0).symm
  unfold cfc_toComplexMeasure
  rw [h1]
  set Φ := compSL C₀((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) ℂ _ _
      (cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y)
      (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
        (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap
  have hΦ_norm : ‖Φ‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ := by
    apply ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_le_bound _ (by positivity)
    intro f
    simp only [Φ, compSL_apply, coe_comp', Function.comp_apply,
      ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_coe]
    calc ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y
            ((@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
              (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm f)‖
      _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖(@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE
              (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm f‖ :=
          ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := by
          gcongr
          · exact cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y
          · -- ‖liftZeroAtInftyCLE.symm f‖ ≤ ‖f‖ (norm-preserving embedding)
            exact le_of_eq rfl
  rw [← ofReal_norm_eq_enorm (a := x), ← ofReal_norm_eq_enorm (a := y),
      ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (norm_nonneg x)]
  exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal hΦ_norm
